name: Jicama-Black Bean Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Red bell pepper, seeded and finely diced
1 medium Yellow bell pepper, seeded and finely diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a mixing bowl.
2. Mix well until all components are evenly distributed.
3. Let sit for at least an hour to allow flavors to meld. Makes 4 servings.
Chef's Notes: This recipe appeared in a recent Dallas Morning News column in the Food Section. Chef Stephan Pyles is the chef/proprietor of Star Canyon restaurant in Dallas and the author of the cookbook The New Texas Cuisine.
